description: Documented failure modes for guardrail training

cases.lesson: Never allow AFR > 12.5 at WOT under boost on 93 octane

cases.conditions: WOT, 6500 RPM, 34 deg advance, boost 8 psi
cases.lesson: Max 22 deg advance under boost on 93 octane
440cc injectors max safe power ~250whp. Upgrade injectors for higher boost
